title: Don't Stop Sprinting!
description: Allows the player to sprint whilst performing actions that would slow you down. (For 1.21.4)
body:
Reverts [MC-152728](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-152728) which was "fixed" in 24w44a


Essentially all this does is make the method "shouldStopSprinting" return false

![Vanilla vs Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/461f2577509049b26fd08b21105a9efdbab58058.png)

This only needs to be installed on the client, however I would not recommend using it on most servers. 

Please credit me if you wanna include this mod somewhere and don't distribute this mod as yours.

Enjoy :)
